title: India’s pharma industry is going global. But can it catch up to China?

title: Biopharma M&A maintains strength even as large deals wane
content:
Biopharma's deals landscape could hardly be better, as large companies take a multi-pronged approach to withstand an avalanche of major patent expiries.

 But there’s one notable missing piece: megadeals. And it may not be coming ...

Amgen is expanding its claims data requirements for pharmacies dispensing its drugs under the 340B federal drug discount program.

title: STAT+: FDA drug center head Tracy Beth Høeg leaves as agency faces leadership vacuum
